sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπεῖδον

- Transliteration: Epeidon

- Phonetic: ep-i'-don

- Definition:

1. to look upon, to regard

- Origin: and other moods and persons of the same tense, from G1909 and G1492

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G1492; to regard (favorably or otherwise): - behold look upon.
